raw_consumer_statement: Due to a XXXX XXXX XXXX I was late by a few days to make a payment, I think when the account was set up they made it purposefully unclear and difficult to make payments so one might have been late but I believe they took the late fee off. I called to make the payment as I couldnt access the account online and they said they had to send a new card, I noticed there were incorrect charges and that someone must have stolen my card information. They said I couldnt make any disputes until I had the new card. I did not receive a card, I received a notice that my account was closed. I then received a letter that my email was undeliverable, the address they had listed was correct and I have been receiving emails. I am not able to access any account information, they keep hanging up and not listening to me on the phone and they are completely corrupt and abusing their power. My credit rating has been severely impacted which makes it so that I can not move nor have access to other banking opportunities. Their treatment has been not only financial abuse, but XXXX  and XXXX  harm as I am prevented from moving while my dog has XXXX XXXX and I need to get her to a better location. This situation is disgusting, they are aware and laughed when I said I was making a complaint and said they have their own legal team and dont care.
